subtasks.description: Query cost warehouse to aggregate budget allocation by product category, calculate trend metrics (YoY, QoQ growth rates), and identify cost drivers. Return category-level budgets, actual spend, variance, and temporal trends.

Reconcile budget data with spend patterns and cost drivers. Perform multi-signal analysis including budget efficiency (actuals vs. allocated), variance trends, and category performance. Generate reallocation recommendations with rationale (shift underutilized allocations, increase high-ROI categories, flag outliers).

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks required: (1) SQL query to gather budget and cost data by category with trend analysis — mid tier handles multi-table joins and aggregation across time periods. (2) Cross-recon to synthesize findings and generate strategic recommendations — frontier tier because reallocation strategy requires multi-signal interpretation (comparing allocation vs. actual, trend velocity, category performance), inference about optimal distribution, and prioritized recommendation logic. Single sql_gen is sufficient; a multi-CTE query with window functions (LAG, YoY calculations) can deliver all metrics in one call. Policy evaluation is not needed unless governance rules are imposed on reallocation.

output.sql: SELECT product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_active_seats, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS license_count, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_users, SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(daily_active_seats), 0) AS cost_per_seat, LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year) AS prior_year_same_quarter_spend, SUM(amount_usd) - LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year) AS yoy_variance, ROUND(100.0 * (SUM(amount_usd) - LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year)) / NULLIF(LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year), 0), 2) AS yoy_growth_pct, LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) AS prior_quarter_spend, SUM(amount_usd) - LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) AS qoq_variance, ROUND(100.0 * (SUM(amount_usd) - LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter)) / NULLIF(LAG(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY product ORDER BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter), 0), 2) AS qoq_growth_pct, SUM(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter) AS total_portfolio_spend, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(SUM(amount_usd)) OVER (PARTITION BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter), 0), 2) AS pct_of_total_spend, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY SUM(amount_usd) DESC) AS spend_rank FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY fiscal_year DESC, fiscal_quarter DESC, total_spend DESC
